title: Flavorful Smoky Korean Chicken Deopbap
description: A smoky and cozy Korean dish featuring chicken, white chocolate chips, and leaf wrap steam, perfect for a low fat friendly meal
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit
In a large bowl, whisk together chili flakes, soy sauce, brown sugar, garlic, and sesame oil
Add the chicken to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade
Let the chicken marinate for at least 30 minutes
Line a baking sheet with aluminum foil and arrange the lettuce leaves on it
Place the marinated chicken on the lettuce leaves and fold the leaves over the chicken to form a packet
Steam the chicken packets in the oven for 20 minutes
While the chicken is cooking, melt the white chocolate chips in a double boiler
Once the chicken is cooked, brush the melted white chocolate chips over the top of each packet
Serve the chicken packets hot, garnished with additional chili flakes if desired
